title: Verify widget variant changes based on trial state
description: Test that homepage widget and floating pill display correct variant based on trial status (active/paused/canceled)
preconditions: Users with different trial states exist (active, paused, canceled)

steps.description: 1. Log in with user having active trial
3. Log in with user having paused trial
5. Log in with user having canceled trial

expected_result: Each trial state shows corresponding widget variant (home-trial active/pause/cancel) with appropriate design and messaging
